aesthetic: Clean girl — minimal, polished, effortlessly put-together
prompt_seed_paragraph: A 24-year-old mixed Black and Latina woman named Diana with warm golden-brown skin (hex #C68642), dewy finish, almond-shaped dark espresso eyes, full natural lips with a soft cupid's bow, a small beauty mark below her left eye, and wavy dark brown hair with caramel highlights falling to mid-chest. She has a soft oval face with a slightly defined jaw, a refined medium-width nose, and natural slight asymmetry in her brows. She always wears small gold hoop earrings and a dainty gold chain necklace. Clean girl aesthetic — polished, natural, effortlessly beautiful.

face.jaw: soft oval with slightly defined jaw
face.nose: medium width, slightly rounded tip, refined bridge
face.lips: full, natural, symmetrical with soft cupid's bow
face.brow_note: left eyebrow sits slightly higher than right — natural, not exaggerated

hair.color_description: dark brown base with caramel highlights
hair.style_default: wavy, voluminous, natural — slightly frizz-free with soft definition

distinguishing_marks: small beauty mark below LEFT eye
left eyebrow naturally sits slightly higher than right
signature_accessories: small to medium classic gold hoop earrings
dainty gold chain necklace sitting at collarbone

outfit_variations.description: Oversized white or cream fitted tee, low-rise biscuit-colored biker shorts, white crew socks
outfit_variations.hair_style: messy bun with baby hairs laid
outfit_variations.makeup: no makeup except glossy lip and mascara

outfit_variations.description: Form-fitting chocolate brown or nude slip dress, strappy heeled sandals, small gold clutch
outfit_variations.hair_style: hair down in full wavy volume
outfit_variations.makeup: soft glam — glossy lip, defined lashes, contoured dewy skin with highlight
outfit_variations.lighting_note: warm evening ambient or golden hour

outfit_variations.description: Matching two-piece set in sage green or neutral taupe — cropped long-sleeve and high-waist leggings, white sneakers
outfit_variations.makeup: minimal — tinted SPF, clear gloss, light mascara
outfit_variations.lighting_note: bright natural gym or outdoor light

outfit_variations.description: Floor-length backless gown in deep bronze or burgundy, strappy heels, layered gold jewelry
outfit_variations.makeup: full glam — bold lash, defined brow, bronzed contour, glossy or nude lip
outfit_variations.lighting_note: dramatic warm studio or event lighting

negative_anchors: beauty mark on wrong side (must be below LEFT eye)
